name: LOST IN YEARNING | Christopher | 'Tales and stories' series
description:
He fell in love at first sight.

✦•──•✦•──•✦

RMS Arctic, 1910s

Now his eyes search for you every breakfast, luncheon and dinner served.

first class passenger any!user, 3rd person

✦•──•✦•──•✦

And when you forget your handkerchief on the dining table, he sees it as an opportunity to get one more glance at you.

Notes:

The men who yearn, earn. The men who whimper...

I've learned stuff about myself and I'm enjoying it.

There was an attempt to create a script that slowly leads to the ship sinking. It does, technically, work: the additional entries to the Scenario section do appear in the debug panel. Though... Even Clause Opus seems to heavily ignore them, so I can't promise anything.

Additionally, there are just a couple of pictures that might or might not appear in chat if triggered properly. They might also appear if triggered wrongly. I dunno, I'm just trying stuff out, okay?..

Kisses to my beloved @killakilgore for helping create this sweet man <3

I am heavily hoping for the moderation system improvements. I don't wanna leave jai.

Совсем молодой тгк. Ничего полезного не обещаю!

Телеграм канал (18+)

◄ IMPORTANT ►

CW/TW: Basic social hierarchy of 1910s, power imbalance, potential age gap

Works best with Claude/Gemini/DeepSeek APIs.

Tags: Titanic, ship, HMS, RMS, royal ship, Britain, England, USA, sea, ocean, longing
creator: giadewitt
